thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.description: Powerful electric shot; 10% chance to stun the goalkeeper briefly

quick_attack.name: Quick Attack
quick_attack.description: Sudden speed burst to blow past one defender

protect.name: Protect
protect.description: Goalkeeper: guarantees save of the next shot this tick

agility.name: Agility
agility.description: Doubles effective Speed for ~10 simulated seconds

tackle.name: Tackle
tackle.description: Forceful tackle with higher success chance than a standard challenge

shadow_ball.name: Shadow Ball
shadow_ball.description: Curling shot that is harder for goalkeepers to read; 20% lowers their SpD

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: Perfectly threaded through-ball that ignores distance penalties

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Thunderous clearance that briefly slows nearby opponents
